name: Player Abilities
desc: Server updates the player's capabilities (flying, invulnerable, creative, fly speed, walk speed).
notes: This is the SERVER→CLIENT version. The server sends this when the player's abilities change. The CLIENT→SERVER version is C13PacketPlayerAbilities (which only carries the isFlying flag).

implementation.overview: S39 is sent by the server to update player abilities — whether flight is allowed, current flying state, fly/walk speeds. Sent on join game (creative mode) and when abilities change (entering flight, spectator, creative toggle). Flight modules use S39 to detect if the server allows flying. Disabler modules modify cached ability values to confuse anti-cheats.

modules.name: Flight / CreativeFly (ability detection)
modules.purpose: Read S39 to check if allowFlying=true. If server allows flying, use vanilla flight instead of packet spoofing. If flying=false but allowFlying=true, toggle flying via C13.
